Base Model List Cache speeds up access b: Umuɣ n uzadur n tebdart Cache yessazzel anekcum s tmudmin tidusanin kan deg ubeddu neɣ deg yiɣewwaren i d-yettwasellken — amestir, maca yezmer lḥal ur d-yesskan ara ibeddilen ineggura n tmudemt azadur.
Boosting or penalizing specific tokens f: Aserkem neɣ angal n yiqenṭaren ulmisen i tririt yettwaḥeṛsen. Azalen ibirusanen ad ttwakecfen gar 100 d 100 (asekcam). Lmut: ala

Connect to your own OpenAI compatible AP: Qqen ɣer wagazen-ik n taggara n API yemṣaban OpenAI.
Constrains effort on reasoning for reaso: Yessefk ad tḥeṛseḍ ussis ɣef ssebba n tmudmin n usseɣẓen. D ayen izemren kan ad yesseɣẓen timudmin seg yisaǧǧawen ulmisen i yettɛawanen ussisen n usseɣẓen.
Control the repetition of token sequence: Ssenqed amek ara tɛawdeḍ ad d-tɛawdeḍ tiseddarin n usekkil deg uḍris-nni i d-yettwalalen. Azal ɛlayen (amedya, 1.5) ad iɛawed ad iɛawed ad iɛawed ad iɛeddi s lǧehd, ma d azal n wadda (amedya, 1.1) ad yili d win yettɛeddin ugar. Ɣef 1, d ameɛdur.
Controls the balance between coherence a: Ssneqdet amnekni garkoerenza d tanḍa n tuffɣa. Azal n wadda ad d-yeglu s wugar n tmuɣli d uḍris udwis.

Enable autocomplete generation for chat: Rmed tasuta tawurmant tummidt i udiwenni iznan
Enable Memory Mapping (mmap) to load mod: Rmed Mapping (map) n usali n yisefka n tmudemt. Tifrat-a ad teǧǧ anagraw ad yesseqdec asigez n uḍebsi d asiɣzef n RAM s udawi n yifuyla n uḍebsi amzun deg RAM i llan. Aya yezmer ad yesnerni aswir n tmudemt s usireg n unekcum ɣer yisefka arurad ugar. D acu kan, yezmer lḥal ur yetteddu ara akken iwata s yinagrawen akk yernu yezmer ad yečč aṭas n tallunt n uḍebsi.
Enable Mirostat sampling for controlling: Rmed askar n Mirostat akken ad tḥekmed deg lbaṭel.
Ensure your CSV file includes 4 columns: Ssefqed afaylu-inek CSV deg-s 4 n tgejda deg uswir-a: Isem, Email, awal uffir, Role.

Enter content for the pending user info: Sekcem agbur n telɣut n useqdac yettwaṛjan. Eǧǧ ilem i tazwara.

Set the number of worker threads used fo: Sbadu amḍan n tnelli n yixeddamen yettwasqedcen i umṣada. Tifrat-a teḥkem acḥal n tnelli i yennumen ttḥerriken issutren i d-iteddun akka tura. Asenqes n wazal-a yezmer ad yesnerni aswir deg usali n yisali n umahil n uḥezzeb meqqren maca yezmer daɣen ad yečč ugar n teɣbula CPU.
Sets the size of the context window used: Sbadu tiddi n tzewwut tasatalant yellan zik tetteg-d asken ay d-yetteddun.
Sets the stop sequences to use. When thi: Sbadu tiseddarin n uḥbas i useqdec. Mi ara d-temlil temɛawdit-a, LLM ad teḥbes asegrew n uḍris d tuɣalin. Timɛayin n uḥbas yeggten zemrent ad ttwasbeddent s usbadu n waṭas n yizamulen n uḥbas yemgaraden deg tmudemt.

Ma yessaweḍ yiwen, tamudemt tezmer ad teṭṭef cwiṭ n wakud akken ad tseddu asatal n umeslay u ad d-tawi tiririt yettxemmimen ugar.
